div.head: The Minister in China (Johnson) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
181. Following is paraphrase of message received from Peck at Nanking in comment on his April 18, 10 a.m., to the Department concerning claims commission:
The action reported in my April 18, 10 a.m., was apparently not contemplated by the Foreign Office when it drafted note verbale of April 16th.Not printed. I am inclined to interpret this partial concession as a diplomatic gesture, confirmation of Sino-Japanese crisis reported in my April 18, 9 a.m.See telegram No. 180, April 18, 7 p.m., from the Minister in China, p. 113.
Note verbale of April 16th was an unsatisfactory reply to Legation’s recent note on claims commission. It requested list of debtors.
